M-046.NAME: krotpn-domain-tls-edge
M-046.owns: krotpn.xyz domain edge, HTTP to HTTPS redirect, wildcard TLS expectations, and shared 443 routing contract for HTTPS plus MTProto.
M-046.purpose: Define the production edge model needed for https://krotpn.xyz and Telegram fake-TLS MTProto proxy to coexist safely.

exports.edge-http-redirect: Force http://krotpn.xyz and http://www.krotpn.xyz to https://krotpn.xyz.
exports.edge-wildcard-tls: Use trusted certificates covering krotpn.xyz and *.krotpn.xyz.
exports.edge-shared-443: Route MTProto fake-TLS by issued SNI and forward normal HTTPS to KrotPN frontend/backend/admin.
exports.edge-static-guard: Static checks proving deploy/install scripts are not redesigned in this phase.

edge-policy.policy-1: Shared 443 design must be verified before replacing direct nginx ownership of 443.
edge-policy.policy-2: Wildcard certificate issuance may remain operator-driven; this module defines runtime expectations first.
edge-policy.policy-3: Existing deploy/install scripts are protected unless the operator explicitly approves edge deployment changes.

constraints.constraint-1: Misrouting 443 can break both website and Telegram proxy, so rollout requires a rollback plan.
constraints.constraint-2: Self-signed certificates are unacceptable for production Telegram fake-TLS links.

M-046.hotspot: H-032: Shared 443 edge can break both HTTPS and Telegram proxy if fallback routing or wildcard TLS is misconfigured
